title: Bump github.com/containers/common from 0.49.1 to 0.50.0
body:
Bumps [github.com/containers/common](https://github.com/containers/common) from 0.49.1 to 0.50.0.
Release notes

Sourced from github.com/containers/common's releases.

v0.50.0

What's Changed

  • RFC: tag v0.49.1 by @​mtrmac in containers/common#1107
  • Podman rmi --no-prune flag by @​karthikelango137 in containers/common#1108
  • libimage: image removal: add hint to external containers by @​vrothberg in containers/common#1111
  • cirrus: bump cpus and ram by @​vrothberg in containers/common#1113
  • ssh package by @​cdoern in containers/common#1094
  • Add conmon-rs paths by @​jakecorrenti in containers/common#1117
  • GHA: Use golang 1.18 + run in verbose mode by @​cevich in containers/common#1120
  • config: look at the conmon-rs version string by @​giuseppe in containers/common#1121
  • Use an alternative CNI lock for read-only config dirs by @​mheon in containers/common#1122
  • Eliminate segfault when image does not have config by @​rhatdan in containers/common#1118
  • Fix spelling mistake by @​rhatdan in containers/common#1128
  • Adjust default volumes for windows compatibility by @​arixmkii in containers/common#1125
  • Add volume plugin timeout to containers.conf by @​mheon in containers/common#1129
  • build(deps): bump github.com/containerd/containerd from 1.6.6 to 1.6.8 by @​dependabot in containers/common#1116
  • config: Allow specifying helper dirs with $BINDIR as base directory by @​filbranden in containers/common#1127
  • Add support for returning image path with ARCH and OS Substitutions by @​rhatdan in containers/common#1119
  • libimage: untag events on image removal by @​vrothberg in containers/common#1132
  • Fix stutters by @​rhatdan in containers/common#1138
  • Change default cgroups mode to enabled on FreeBSD by @​dfr in containers/common#1137
  • build(deps): bump github.com/onsi/gomega from 1.20.0 to 1.20.1 by @​dependabot in containers/common#1139
  • build(deps): bump github.com/onsi/ginkgo/v2 from 2.1.4 to 2.1.6 by @​dependabot in containers/common#1141
  • docs: containers.conf: list all log drivers by @​vrothberg in containers/common#1133
  • cgroup: do not fail with missing cpuset file by @​giuseppe in containers/common#1135
  • build(deps): bump github.com/onsi/gomega from 1.20.1 to 1.20.2 by @​dependabot in containers/common#1143
  • build(deps): bump github.com/docker/go-units from 0.4.0 to 0.5.0 by @​dependabot in containers/common#1144
  • pkg/report: handle newline in template string by @​Luap99 in containers/common#1146
  • Update vendor of containers/(storage,image) by @​rhatdan in containers/common#1149
  • Add labels to secrets by @​ashley-cui in containers/common#1147
  • Ignore additionalstore images when deciding to use netavark or CNI by @​rhatdan in containers/common#1148
  • phg/config: do not force default EventsLogFilePath by @​Luap99 in containers/common#1151
  • Use StoreOpts for secret store API by @​ashley-cui in containers/common#1150
  • build(deps): bump github.com/docker/docker from 20.10.17+incompatible to 20.10.18+incompatible by @​dependabot in containers/common#1153
  • libimage: remove: fix event by @​vrothberg in containers/common#1154
  • libnetwork/types: add correct swagger types by @​Luap99 in containers/common#1156
  • config: look user id instead of rootless by @​giuseppe in containers/common#1157
  • build(deps): bump github.com/onsi/ginkgo/v2 from 2.1.6 to 2.2.0 by @​dependabot in containers/common#1158
  • build(deps): bump github.com/coreos/go-systemd/v22 from 22.3.2 to 22.4.0 by @​dependabot in containers/common#1159
  • config: correct the check for root by @​giuseppe in containers/common#1161
  • libimage: platform: check if image is corrupted by @​vrothberg in containers/common#1160
  • add proper handling for golang ssh by @​cdoern in containers/common#1136
  • Eval symlinks on XDG_RUNTIME_DIR by @​rhatdan in containers/common#1162
  • libimage.NormalizePlatform: normalize default variant as per specified arch by @​flouthoc in containers/common#1164
  • build(deps): bump github.com/opencontainers/selinux from 1.10.1 to 1.10.2 by @​dependabot in containers/common#1166
  • Vendor in latest containers/storage by @​rhatdan in containers/common#1165
  • util, GetRuntimeDir: don't error out early if XDG_RUNTIME_DIR is not set. by @​flouthoc in containers/common#1167

New Contributors

  • @​karthikelango137 made their first contribution in containers/common#1108

... (truncated)

Commits
  • a8fe7cf Bump to v0.50.0
  • d3f9c37 Update vendor of containers/image
  • 2d1b45a Merge pull request #1167 from flouthoc/fix-regression
  • ddd92be Merge pull request #1165 from rhatdan/VENDOR
  • 805f35a Vendor in latest containers/storage
  • 0f1b849 Merge pull request #1166 from containers/dependabot/go_modules/github.com/ope...
  • 9bd5c94 util, GetRuntimeDir: don't error out early if XDG_RUNTIME_DIR is not found
  • 333f405 build(deps): bump github.com/opencontainers/selinux
  • 8e7519d Merge pull request #1164 from flouthoc/normalize-platform-first
  • 764a413 libimage.NormalizePlatform: normalize default variant as per specified arch
  • Additional commits viewable in compare view

[![Dependabot compatibility score](https://dependabot-badges.githubapp.com/badges/compatibility_score?dependency-name=github.com/containers/common&package-manager=go_modules&previous-version=0.49.1&new-version=0.50.0)](https://docs.github.com/en/github/managing-security-vulnerabilities/about-dependabot-security-updates#about-compatibility-scores) Dependabot will resolve any conflicts with this PR as long as you don't alter it yourself. You can also trigger a rebase manually by commenting `@dependabot rebase`. [//]: # (dependabot-automerge-start) [//]: # (dependabot-automerge-end) ---
Dependabot commands and options
You can trigger Dependabot actions by commenting on this PR: - `@dependabot rebase` will rebase this PR - `@dependabot recreate` will recreate this PR, overwriting any edits that have been made to it - `@dependabot merge` will merge this PR after your CI passes on it - `@dependabot squash and merge` will squash and merge this PR after your CI passes on it - `@dependabot cancel merge` will cancel a previously requested merge and block automerging - `@dependabot reopen` will reopen this PR if it is closed - `@dependabot close` will close this PR and stop Dependabot recreating it. You can achieve the same result by closing it manually - `@dependabot ignore this major version` will close this PR and stop Dependabot creating any more for this major version (unless you reopen the PR or upgrade to it yourself) - `@dependabot ignore this minor version` will close this PR and stop Dependabot creating any more for this minor version (unless you reopen the PR or upgrade to it yourself) - `@dependabot ignore this dependency` will close this PR and stop Dependabot creating any more for this dependency (unless you reopen the PR or upgrade to it yourself)

comments.body: Looks like github.com/containers/common is up-to-date now, so this is no longer needed.
